specific_mechanism: Three independently-controlled output channels additively compose final pixel.
llm_application: OCTOPUS-DECODE: 3-head additive logit decoder (pigment-LM-head + iridophore-policy-amplifier + leucophore-entropy-scatter); each head independently trainable.
novelty_claim: Multi-tower decoder + contrastive layer decoding cover adjacent primitives. Additive role-functional 3-head composition is open.
